name: gowtham
description: A structured software engineering workflow as installable Claude Code skills: design → task breakdown → test-driven implementation.

plugins.name: agent-skills
plugins.description: Skills that enforce a structured engineering pipeline — requirement clarification, architectural design, self-contained task breakdown, and Red-Green-Refactor TDD, with per-feature stage documents and status tracking. Includes a PR scorecard skill for pull request risk triage.
